parameters.responseBody: ={"ok":false,"status":"error","message":"Please send a longer symptom description and include chat_id."}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { message: $json.message, channel: $json.channel, chat_id: $json.chat_id, phone_number: $json.phone_number, preferred_language: $json.preferred_language, facility_location: $json.facility_location, offline_mode: $json.offline_mode } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, status: $('Prepare Delivery').item.json.response_status || 'complete', ticket_id: $('Prepare Delivery').item.json.ticket_id, urgency_level: $('Prepare Delivery').item.json.urgency_level, message: 'Triage request received and processed.' } }}
={{ { ok: true, status: $json.response_status || 'complete', ticket_id: $json.ticket_id, urgency_level: $json.urgency_level, message: 'Triage request received and processed.' } }}
